title: Chemical Technician
description:
• Operate the process to meet the conditions specified in manuals/instructions
  • Operate the process equipments at site in accordance with operation plan.
  • Take measures to improve production status and equipment performance on productivity and quality after approval of shift senior technician
  • Patrol plant process, confirm the condition of process and equipments and report disordered matter to senior shift technicians.
  • Prepare and organised patrol records
  • Take a sampling for analysis of products and process evaluation.
  • Report all incidents, near misses, deviation from plan and take part in further investigation when required.
  • Assist in coordination of daily maintenance planning, and participate in maintenance activities and shutdown/start-up of sections.
  • Provide support for maintenance group /quality control group, if any problem arises.
  • Work as shift Analyst , when designed by supervisors
  • Perform the role as an auxiliary fire Fighter
  • Experience in chemical plant.
  • Possess basic knowledge of maintenance, chemical engineering and analytical procedures.
  • Experience in operation via DCS systems is advantageous.

Working Location :Jurong Island ( Transport provided at Jurong East Mrt)

Working Hours: 12 hrs rotating shifts (Shift Pattern: 3223)

By sending your job resume to us, it shall be deemed that you have agreed and hereby give your consent to MANFIELD in collecting, using and/ or disclosing your personal data for the purpose of accessing and processing your job application and/ or for future job opportunities within MANFIELD and/ or with the client(s) of MANFIELD. If you wish to withdraw your consent, please notify us. Kindly visit our company website for more information on the Privacy Policy.

WE REGRET TO INFORM THAT ONLY SHORTLISTED CANDIDATES WILL BE NOTIFIED

postedCompany.description:
Manfield is a professional Headhunting, Recruitment and Consultancy Company first established in Singapore since 1995, we have also expanded our presence to Mainland China since 2005.

Our consultants in Manfield possess in-depth knowledge and expertise of industries that they specialise in.

With more than 100,000 unique profiles in our database, our dedicated team is constantly to source, interview and shortlist the ideal people for organisations, and have the passion to deliver effective human capital solutions. We are passionate to serve to our best capacity. We uphold professional values and instill confidence in our clients, including establishing long term business relationships with them.
